allow: Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('marine_race_arena/tracks/marine_race_horseshoe_bay.json'\)\); print\(json.dumps\({k:d.get\(k\) for k in ['race','referee','finish']}, indent=2\)\); print\('---GATE_SEQUENCE---'\); print\(d['track']['gate_sequence']\); print\('---FIRST_GATE---'\); print\(json.dumps\(d['gates'][0], indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('marine_race_arena/tracks/marine_race_horseshoe_bay.json'\)\); print\('laps', d['race'].get\('laps'\)\); print\('gate_sequence_len', len\(d['track']['gate_sequence']\)\); print\('gate_sequence', d['track']['gate_sequence']\); print\('penalties', d['referee'].get\('penalties'\)\); print\('gate_validation', d['referee'].get\('gate_validation'\)\); print\('participants_n', len\(d['participants']\)\); print\('p0_spawn', d['participants'][0].get\('spawn'\)\); print\('start', d.get\('start'\)\)")
